name: Kim
message: My kids and I live in VA. We would love to come say hi and show you some support when you get through to Shenandoah! Give us a list if you need anything! And amazing choice for an adventure! I’m doing this when I retire in 6 years!

name: Alexis
message: You got this ! You should be so proud of yourself, to take on such a challenge.

name: Paul C
message: Go Laura, go! Sending you strength and love.

name: Ashley
message: I just saw your husbands post on instagram instagram. I’m wishing you a safe journey!! 🍀

name: Gabby B
message: Amazing! I love the Appalachian Trail! This is definitely a goal once I get more experience under the belt. You are an inspiration!

name: Maura
message: Love that you have trail friends and do people really give up on day three?

name: Pam (Morgan's Mom)
message: We are AMAZED by you Laura!  My 3rd grade class is following you and cheering you on every day!  We are using all your stats for math lessons!  :)
